name: OnMind Marketing
tagline: Marketing site and content studio for OnMind CRM
description: Marketing site and internal content studio for OnMind CRM, a WhatsApp communications SaaS targeting real estate businesses. The platform combines public landing pages with an internal dashboard to plan strategy, design social pieces, and produce branded image and video content. Pieces are rendered in isolated Vercel Sandbox microVMs using Remotion templates, then scheduled and published to Instagram from a single workflow.
highlights: Multiple landing page variants (minimal, bold, editorial, creative) with shared brand system
Internal dashboard for strategy, brand assets, templates, pieces, and scheduling
Image and video piece generation via Remotion rendered in Vercel Sandbox
Instagram publishing pipeline with captions, scheduling, and post history
Passwordless OTP authentication with Resend + React Email
Asset storage on Vercel Blob and OG image generation with Satori
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md, .claude/ directory with skills, and AGENTS.md configured)
